overview: A comprehensive environmental compliance dashboard for coal mine operations. Tracks EC/CTO conditions with due dates and responsible officers, logs air quality and piezometer monitoring data, and maintains a planted trees inventory — all in one place for regulatory reporting.
features: Compliance task tracking with EC/CTO conditions, due dates, statuses, and RO assignment
Air quality and piezometer monitoring data entry with historical trend views
Planted trees inventory with species, location, and planting date
Dashboard overview with compliance summary and upcoming deadlines
Filter and sort compliance tasks by status, due date, or responsible officer
Monthly monitoring report aggregating all environmental readings
